chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.609 & 610 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1.For order on CMA No.2837/2024 (condonation) 2.For order on office objection No.01 & 03 3.For order on CMA No.2838/2024 4.For order on CMA No.2839/2024 (exemption) 24.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Din holding brief for Mr. Hussain Ahmed, advocate for applicant ---------- These are prima facie time barred reference applications pending since 2024. Despite of passage of one year no notice has been sought issued. Even today learned counsel holding brief for Mr. Hussain Ahmed, advocate for the applicant seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in present proceedings. Therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
